rows.label: qev035701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo! How've you been since then?
Have you been tearing the Growth bastards to pieces again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0011
rows.name: Boast about the number of Growth you've defeated.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Reprimand Slovity, saying she should stop
needless killing.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0002
rows.name:
You've killed that many!
As expected of a warrior recognized by me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0003
rows.name:
But we haven't lost either, you know?
Team Slovity has also taken many heads of the Growth
in various regions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0004
rows.name:
What's that?
Is that an Earthling-style joke?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0005
rows.name:
While you've been lazing around,
Team Slovity has taken many heads of the Growth
in various regions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hehe, I wanted to show [ST:playername ]
our exploits in the Black Steel Continent the other day, Trigo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0007
rows.name:
No... The Captain was being too reckless.
Before we knew it, she charged into the enemy camp alone...
We were terrified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0008
rows.name:
You worry too much.
It's fine, I won't lose to guys like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Oh... By the way, were you able to analyze the data
their boss had?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yeah, it seems they've been gathering a ton of soldiers
at the fortresses around there lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0011
rows.name:
I bet they're planning something no good again anyway.
Next time, we'll form a strategy and attack...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Alright! In that case,
since [ST:playername ] is here too,
the two of us will go attack their fortress for a bit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0013
rows.name:
Wh...!?
To do something so reckless...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Hehe, it's fine, right?
I wanted to go on a rampage
together with you at least once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0015
rows.name: Hey! You too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Captain.
If you're going, make proper preparations first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Stuff like this has to be done swiftly, like a Wolfen.
You guys stay back and prepare for the next battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Alright, let's go!
We'll meet up in front of the Lotus Fortress Construction Site![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0019
rows.name:
The retribution for controlling and hurting my comrades
with that weird suit...
I'll return the favor by crushing an entire platoon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well then... Let's start with this fortress.
Have you ever attacked their fortresses before?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0030
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0031
rows.name: Stick out your chest and boast that you beat them down.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0040
rows.name: Humility

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0041
rows.name: Speak bitterly, saying it was a tough fight.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0027
rows.name:
Haha! How reliable!
Then I don't think I need to explain anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'd like to see the guys
who gave you a hard time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0029
rows.name:
Well, in that case, I'll teach you
one way to attack their fortresses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0030
rows.name:
In most places, Growth fortresses are commanded
by two bosses: the captain and the vice-captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0031
rows.name:
So if we crush both of them at once,
we can shred their chain of command for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0032
rows.name: So, I have a proposal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'll go ahead and kill one of them first,
and then you follow up by killing the remaining one.
How about it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0034
rows.name:
Then, we'll time how long it takes to fight the bosses
and compete to see who can defeat them faster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0035
rows.name:
Hehe, sound good? I wanted to settle things with you
once and for all to see who's better![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0130
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0131
rows.name: Accept Slovity's challenge.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0140
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0141
rows.name: Reprimand Slovity, saying this isn't a game.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0036
rows.name:
I knew you'd say that!
That's exactly why you're a warrior I have my eye on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0037
rows.name: Well then, let's begin the match right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0038
rows.name:
What are you talking about! Is there any game
more interesting than a brawl to the death![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0039
rows.name:
Just stop complaining
and we'll start the match![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0040
rows.name:
I'll go attack that fortress first,
so you wait right there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0041
rows.name:
Burn the strength of the Captain of Team Slovity
into your eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0042
rows.name:
Kept you waiting.
I've defeated the captain for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0043
rows.name:
It took a bit of effort, but...
The time is... 5 minutes. Not bad at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0044
rows.name:
Now, can you defeat the boss of the fortress
faster than I did?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0045
rows.name: Well then, go tear them to pieces![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0046
rows.name:
Now, show me you can defeat the boss of this fortress
faster than I did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0047
rows.name:
Don't worry! With your abilities,
you should be able to keep up with me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0048
rows.name:
...You're back. Did you properly kill the boss
within the time limit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0050
rows.name: Confidence

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0051
rows.name: Say it was an easy win.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0060
rows.name: Complaint

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0061
rows.name: Complain that it was tough without Slovity's help.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0049
rows.name:
...Heh, managing to finish it faster than me.
As expected of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0050
rows.name:
Even while saying that, you defeated their boss
faster than I did, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0051
rows.name:
Being so strong yet cautious...
You're a terrifying one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0052
rows.name: I lost this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0053
rows.name: Let's have another match.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0054
rows.name:
This time, I'll take the vice-captain,
and you take the captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0055
rows.name: That makes it fair play, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0056
rows.name:
I'll go ahead and scout!
Hurry up and come![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0057
rows.name: ...You're finally here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0058
rows.name:
I went ahead and scouted, but
it looks like the defenses are much tighter than the last fortress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0059
rows.name:
Hehe! That just makes it worth doing, right?
Looks like I'll be able to enjoy my match with you even more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0071
rows.name: Smile fearlessly and say you're looking forward to it.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0080
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0081
rows.name: Mutter sadly that battles are not something to enjoy.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0060
rows.name:
That's the spirit!
Let's go on a massive rampage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0061
rows.name:
I'm glad I invited you after all.
I figured you were the same kind of battle maniac as me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0062
rows.name:
What are you saying?
Making a weird face like that, is your stomach upset or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0063
rows.name:
...Well, whatever you think,
that strength of yours is the real deal! It's fun playing together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0064
rows.name: Hehe! Then I'll go kill their boss first![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0065
rows.name:
This time, I'll kill them even faster
than before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0066
rows.name: How's this! This time it's...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0067
rows.name:
3 minutes!
It won't be that easy to beat this, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0068
rows.name:
Now, hurry up and go kill their boss
one more time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0069
rows.name:
My time is 3 minutes.
Beating this should be difficult even for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0070
rows.name:
Now, hurry up and go kill their boss
one more time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0071
rows.name:
That face... So you successfully killed them.
And faster than I did, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0072
rows.name:
Hehe, it's frustrating but fun... A weird feeling.
This is the first time I've felt like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0073
rows.name:
With you, it feels like we could even take down
the Dryland Cave Fortress... the biggest fortress around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0074
rows.name:
...Alright! I was only planning to go this far today, but
I want to enjoy this even more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0075
rows.name:
Let's hit the next fortress too!
You can still keep going, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0091
rows.name: Beat your chest and say leave it to me.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0100
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0101
rows.name: Say you're tired for today.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0076
rows.name:
You're the best!
Then I'll go on ahead, so come quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0077
rows.name: Say your sleep-talking after you've actually slept![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0078
rows.name:
Just do it! I'm going ahead,
so hurry up and come![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0079
rows.name:
Hey! While I was scouting just now,
I found someone unbelievable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0080
rows.name: It was that Megisia who attacked us before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0081
rows.name:
No, it's not a misunderstanding!
Her way of speaking... that unpleasant feeling...
It was exactly the same as what I heard through the suit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0082
rows.name:
You supposedly killed her once,
so why is she still alive...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0110
rows.name: Guess

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0111
rows.name:
Suggest that she might have a mechanical body
like a B.B.

rows.label: qev035701_JNK0120
rows.name: Bold

rows.label: qev035701_SEL0121
rows.name: Laugh and say you just have to defeat her again.

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0083
rows.name:
...I see, you're smart.
That certainly sounds possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0084
rows.name:
If that's the case... This time, we have to beat her down
so thoroughly she can never resurrect again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0085
rows.name:
You're right!
It doesn't matter what she is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0086
rows.name:
This time, let's smash her so thoroughly
that she can never come back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0087
rows.name:
Alright... Then I'm off!
I'll finish this with my best time yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0088
rows.name:
You might not have a job left to do
for this fortress, but if that happens, forgive me, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0089
rows.name:
...You are the comrade of this foolish Slovity...
[ST:playername ]... correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0090
rows.name:
I am the youngest sister of the Megisia series...
MG068: Megisia...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0091
rows.name:
I am sending this communication from the terminal
of this foolish Bias, Slovity Pagus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0092
rows.name:
You understand what that means, don't you?
If you do not come to me immediately,
Slovity's life is forfeit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035701_MSG0093
rows.name:
Hurry... come and be executed,
you lower lifeform who killed my sister.[ST:wait ]
